title: Survivalist - Fabric
description: A realistic expansion of minecraft's survival aspects.
body:
![survivalist banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0ddcda009effd85d6553c5ffed8024401c4cc6_0.webp) ### **There are **NO** quests and railroading - you make your adventure!** Survivalist is a fabric modpack focused on mild realism and enhancing the Minecraft survival experience with more difficult but pleasant mechanics. It additionally greatly expands upon the fun of exploration by adding many remarkable structures, biomes, animals, ruins, and weapons. ## Highlights ![highlights banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff112428331713de36a958a7f116773623ebc90_0.webp) - You can't start punching a tree and expect it to drop logs anymore. The [starting stage](https://modrinth.com/mod/earlystage) of the game has been completely reworked. - You need to look around, analyze, and determine the [temperature](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-as-nails) of the biome you're in. If it's too hot or cold you will start taking damage. Lanterns and wool clothes are a good way to warm up initially. - You have a hydration system to keep track of - Food can and will [spoil](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoiled) after a certain period of time and you need to make special food storage to slow down the process. Those can be seen below: - Shulker Box: 0% Spoilage - Chest: 70% Spoilage - Barrel: 60% Spoilage - Fridge: 30% Spoilage - All Heated Ovens/Smokers/Furnaces: 10% Spoilage - Keep track of your [nutrition](https://modrinth.com/mod/nutritionz) or have debuffs based on your deficiencies - Torches, lanterns, and campfires no longer become pre-[lit](https://modrinth.com/mod/totally-lit). You need to find [lit](https://modrinth.com/mod/totally-lit) torches, lava or craft a flint and steel to keep yourself away from the darkness. Magical or electrical alternatives are also an option if you manage to get your hands on them. - All [mobs have been enhanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/improved-mobs) with new AI and abilities. - Zombies can break blocks to get to you - Skeletons can melee with the other hand while retaining their bow - There are a lot of new [creeper types](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul), blending them with the atmosphere of the world - All mobs with hands can have axes, pickaxes, swords, lava buckets, flint and steel, and other tools that they can use to fight you (or to burn your house :) ) - All mobs can jump and will try to find a path to you instead of looking at you if you are 2 blocks higher - The game's difficulty will ramp up over the time and distance passed by the player. To combat this, you should progress quickly and find [heart crystals](https://modrinth.com/mod/healing-pretty-good) that can increase your maximum health considerably (but have a 10-heart increase limit). - Many ambient animals like [birds](https://modrinth.com/mod/fowlplay), [lions](https://modrinth.com/mod/living-things), [elephants](https://modrinth.com/mod/living-things), [monkeys](https://modrinth.com/mod/living-things), [ducks](https://modrinth.com/mod/untitled-duck-mod), [capybaras](https://modrinth.com/mod/clutter), more [fish](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves) and others have been added. Some vanilla animals have been enhanced to be more [realistic](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-bees) (or just look better). - More crops and foods provided by the [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) mod, including an [**alcohol brewing**](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) system. The mod greatly integrates with some of the other additions in the pack using addons such as [End's delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-delight) and [Nether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated) - The entire first-person perspective has been changed by showing the [player's body](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) with new [visuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals) to show blood, heartbeats, and other effects depending on the player's situation. Moreover, the [head movements](https://modrinth.com/mod/cameraoverhaul) are simulated and a new [block placing animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/a-good-place) is added. - The world and its ambiance have been completely reworked. Many new biome's have been added thanks to mod like [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) and [Terrastia](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria). [Ambient sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds) have been added and many [special effects](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective) including a [soft particle rework](https://modrinth.com/mod/subtle-effects). You can find [more flowers](https://modrinth.com/mod/bushier-flowers), [rocks and sticks](https://modrinth.com/mod/this-rocks) on the ground like you would in the real world, and they're quite useful! [Grass now wraps around the entire block](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettergrassify) and seamlessly connects to dirt. - A more realistic [minimap/worldmap system](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases) using minecraft maps and an atlas. If you have a calendar, it will also show you the [current season](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasonhud-fabric) along with your coordinates and the biome you're in. - Speaking of [seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons), the world will cycle through all the seasons, starting at a random point (unless you're in hardcore which will always start you in winter). All seasons affect your temperature and the world around you. Snow physics are [reworked](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic) too, with the addition of many [wintery items](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowy-spirit). [Puddles](https://modrinth.com/mod/puddles) will appear after rain to immerse you even more. - Many new transportation options like [cars](https://modrinth.com/mod/automobility), [planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) and [medival carts](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts). - Horses have gained new abilities using [horseshoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillastar-horses)! Enchant them with frostwalker, feather falling, and others! You can also enchant and trim horse armor now. - All [pets will now always teleport](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/companion) even if the chunk unloads. They will also retreat and refuse to attack when on low health - Many new weapons like [maces](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-armoury), [daggers](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-armoury), [medival weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) and [**GUNS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank) with their own unique abilities. You can also [attack through grass](https://modrinth.com/mod/cut-through) now! - Many optimization mods like [sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [let me despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd), - GUI improvements like [item descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-descriptions), [in-depth hunger bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin), [blur](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus), [dark loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen), [dynamic crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair), [complete tooltip overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedtooltips), [inventory tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui), [talk bubbles](https://modrinth.com/mod/talkbubbles) and [JADE](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - [EMI Item Finder](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) with [effect](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) and [loot](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi-loot), [breeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding) information. - Chat improvements such as [chat heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads), [emoji support](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojiful) and [increase histroy limit](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory). - The [trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod is added, incorporating the new [realistic zoom system](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer) and the minimap system with [spyglass](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-trinket-slot) and [map atlas](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases) slots! Additional gear is also available from other misc mods. - Find [artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) in a variety of different new structures that you can equip to gain different unique abilities. - Dead pets will now drop their [broken nametag](https://modrinth.com/mod/broken-nametags) as a memorial. - Reworked [nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes), [end](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-end-island) with [new biomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) and [many other vanilla structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api). - More [villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tidal-towns), [towns, towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers) and ships that can be found in the ocean! - If you don't want to settle down, start exploring the biomes, searching for [houses](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-structures), [boulders](https://modrinth.com/mod/philips-biome-features) and [dungeons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/structory). - And MUCH MORE! Every mod makes up for the (kinda) unique experience in Survivalist. ## Miscellaneous Feature/Mod List ![features banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/066ca7d054ad8ee132cbf39f99b3228ff39ecca7_0.webp) - [Immersive Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - [Integrated Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-furniture) - [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - [Vanilla Block Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) - [Enhanced Book Loot](https://modrinth.com/datapack/babel) - [Easy Anvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) - [Bamboo Everything](https://modrinth.com/mod/bamboo-everything) - [Better Animation Collection](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations-collection) - [Better F3 Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - [Better Biome Blend](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbrb) - [Carry Mobs and Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on) - [Computers!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) - [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts) - [Connected Textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - [Arrows Stick to Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-pin-cushions) - [Reworked Explosions](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement) - [More Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-enchanting) - [Moyai](https://modrinth.com/mod/moyai) - [Healing Campfires](https://modrinth.com/mod/healing-campfire) - [Hammers](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-hammers) - [Item Tiers](https://modrinth.com/mod/tieredz) - [Open Doors Together](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors) - [Free Elytra Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) - [Dynamic Lighting](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - [Moyai](https://modrinth.com/mod/moyai) - [Pickup Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) - [Inventory Sorting](https://modrinth.com/mod/nemos-inventory-sorting) - [Lavaworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/lavaworks) - [Glass Strairs and Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-glass) - [Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd) - [Keybind Enhancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/too-many-shortcuts) - [Visual Workbench](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-workbench) - [Improved Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) (Based on the season :D) - [Item Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemphysic) - [Physical Falling Trees](https://modrinth.com/datapack/physical-falling-trees) - [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) - [Added missing mob drops](https://modrinth.com/datapack/missing-mob-drops) - [Realistic Zoom In](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer) (Requires a spyglass) - [Warrior Rage](https://modrinth.com/mod/warrior-rage) - [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) - All other mod links are scattered around the highlights section showing what the different mods do. ## Known Issues ![known issues banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2408463ac7e2d0f8884629d942ab37f3d29463d3_0.webp)
Living Things mobs do not spawn in modded biomes This is partially my fault because i have not made the effort to add all the modded biomes in the mod config. I hope living things adds biome tags support soon
"Dear ImGui Assertion Failed" type crashes Relaunch the game. If it doesn't work, reinstall and modpack (backup your old worlds)/
The mod isn't 100% realistic! I know. But Minecraft isn't too. Things like waystones, the bumblebee zone, and heart crystals are up for debate but they're staying for now.
What is the difference between "Survivalist - Fabric" and "Survivalist - Forge" 1.20.1 Forge: - Way harder - More unrealistic - Complete progression overhaul - Needs a more beefy computer - 1.20.1

Fabric: - Easier - Fewer mods - Runs on 2GB of ram - Closer to vanilla+ experience - 1.21.1
Why is "Survivalist - Fabric" 1.21.1 but "Survivalist - Forge" 1.20.1 Survivalist - Forge is supposed to be a heavier, more feature-rich version of Survivalist. While I usually prefer using the newest major Minecraft versions, many mods haven't been ported to 1.21.1 yet, so I decided to use 1.20.1 for Survivalist - Forge in order to make a more advanced modpack compared to the Fabric version.

In simple terms "Survivalist - Fabric" is lighter and closer to the vanilla+ feel than "Survivalist - Forge", while "Survivalist - Forge" is more advanced and way more difficult. They're completely incompatible with each other.
## Also check out [Survivalist - Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/survivalist-forge) for a more hardcore experience!
